creator: murray@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: analyzed->closed

Well, Usenix is hardly a non-profit, so I wouldn't have listed them 
with the FreeBSD Foundation above. 

Apparently, someone at WRS did eventually re-register the domains, so 
the worst situation (domain grabbed by a squatter) was avoided. 

It's not clear to me at this point if Usenix is even going to sponsor 
the next BSDCon, so IMHO the domain is in as good of hands with WRS as 
it is with Usenix, Apple, or any other BSD friendly organization.
